other_findings.finding: Monocytes are predominantly located in the peripheral blood compartment and are rare in tissue samples.
Differential expression analysis identified monocyte-specific genes including FCN1 and LYZ.

evidence_quotes.quote: Monocyte cluster markers include CD14 and LYZ.
